roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S MOTION FOR RETURN PROPERTY FILED

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO RETURN PROPERTY/NP/X:CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT EVA FOURAKIS PRESENT UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF LILAH WOLF/X:RONNIE WAGNER PRESENT ON BEHALF OF SFPD BY ZOOM/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO RETURN PROPERTY IS GRANTED BYTHE COURT/CTORD:CATALYTIC CONVERTERS BOOKED UNDER SFPD CASE NUMBER 200-273-871 ARE TO BE RETURNED TO SERGIO A, JACKSON/X:ORDER ON MOTION TO RETURNPROPERTY FILED/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MO PC 1385:IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE/CTORD:THATTHE GPS DEVICE BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT AND THAT HE NO LONGER BE ON HOME DETENTION/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 06-18-20 (30TH)/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON HOME DETENTION BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/RX/DTC/WEAP/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:  PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/DOP/
